title: Tacos de Casabe
description: A crispy casabe taco filled with spicy meats and fresh toppings.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it into small pieces.
3. Add the diced onion and cook until softened.
4. Stir in the tangy tomatillo salsa and cook for 1-2 minutes.
5. Warm the casabe pieces by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the tacos by placing a spoonful of the beef mixture onto each casabe piece.
7. Top with shredded cheese, chopped cilantro, and a dollop of sour cream.
8. Serve immediately and garnish with toasted tortilla strips and sliced avocado.
9. Optional: Add diced tomatoes, shredded lettuce, or diced jalapenos for extra flavor and texture.
10. Enjoy your delicious tacos de casabe!
